branchCommitMessages: feat(darwin): enable fira-code font in fonts module
gitStatus.diff:
diff --git a/modules/darwin/fonts.nix b/modules/darwin/fonts.nix
index 0d6b634..28e767a 100644
--- a/modules/darwin/fonts.nix
+++ b/modules/darwin/fonts.nix
@@ -13,9 +13,8 @@
   #   manual steps here if required by other tooling.
   #
   fonts.packages = with pkgs; [
-    # Example fonts (uncomment to enable):
-    # noto-fonts  # general multilingual font family
-    # fira-code   # programming font with ligatures
+    # Added coding font
+    fira-code   # programming font with ligatures
   ];
 
   # Document any macOS-specific font handling or pitfalls here for future

summary.commitMessage: feat(darwin): enable fira-code font in fonts module
summary.instructions: Open your favorite code editor or terminal and start typing code to see the new Fira Code font in action.

items.description: The Fira Code font is now installed, giving you a programming font with ligatures for a cleaner, more readable code appearance.
items.title: New Coding Font
